title: Public health updates - Canada.ca
content:
## Public health updates
For the latest news or to receive updates on specific health topics, subscribe to our email or RSS update services.

## Email subscription lists
- Family Violence Prevention
- Canada Communicable Disease Report (CCDR)
- Communicable Diseases and Infection Control Updates
- Biosafety and biosecurity in Canada
- Canadian Immunization Guide Update - Mailing List
- Health Promotion and Chronic Disease Prevention in Canada (HPCDP)
- Public Health Notices - Enteric Illness Outbreak Investigations
- FluWatch surveillance
- Canadian Field Epidemiology Program e-mail subscription service
- National Vaccine Catalogue notification services

## Subscribe to our RSS feeds

### About RSS feeds and readers
RSS is a tool for keeping track of website updates. It alerts you to updates so you don't need to keep checking the website. Each update includes a headline, a brief summary or lead-in, and a link to the updated page.
You can view your RSS feeds using a program or website called an RSS reader. These can be downloaded to your device or used in a web browser. There are many different RSS readers to choose from. You can find them wherever you download apps, or by searching for "rss readers".

### How to sign up for an RSS feed
To sign up for one of our RSS feeds, copy the relevant link below and paste it into your RSS feed reader. If you later decide that you no longer want to receive updates, you can delete the feed or URL from your RSS reader.
Public Health Updates https://www.canada.ca/content/dam/phac-aspc/rss/new-eng.xml
Media Room https://www.canada.ca/en/public-health.atom.xml
Travel Health Advisories https://www.canada.ca/content/dam/phac-aspc/rss/tm-mv-eng.xml
Canada Communicable Disease Report (CCDR) https://www.canada.ca/content/dam/phac-aspc/rss/ccdr-rmtc-eng.xml
Chronic Disease Update https://www.canada.ca/content/dam/phac-aspc/rss/cd-mc-eng.xml
Food Safety https://www.canada.ca/content/dam/phac-aspc/rss/food-safety.xml
Health Promotion and Chronic Disease Prevention in Canada (HPCDP) https://www.canada.ca/content/dam/phac-aspc/rss/cdic-mcc-eng.xml
Canadian Pandemic Influenza Preparedness https://www.canada.ca/content/dam/phac-aspc/rss/cpip-pcgp-eng.xml
